segments.text: Well, let's see how far he can escape
segments.original_text: まあドラミギはどこまでいなして

segments.text: And what's his best option here?
segments.original_text: なおかつどうでしょうドラミギの最大の

segments.text: Wow, reading the roll perfectly—what happens next...
segments.original_text: うわーっと転がり読んでいったその後

segments.text: This match is moving incredibly fast!
segments.original_text: 非常に試合展開が早いですね

segments.text: Right, it all comes down to the edgeguard situation
segments.original_text: そうですね結局この外出した後どうするかというところはありますね

segments.text: Exactly, that's the signature play right there
segments.original_text: そうですよね真骨頂ですからね

full_text: Well, let's see how far he can escape And what's his best option here? Wow, reading the roll perfectly—what happens next... This match is moving incredibly fast! Right, it all comes down to the edgeguard situation Exactly, that's the signature play right there Ohhh! Insane bair!

corrections.rule: smash term + mishearing (クレチューしろ→クレイジー空後)
